instructions.title: Usage & Preparation Guide
instructions.subtitle: Purpose and preparation method for each EMBIO product
instructions.warning1: Do not mix with chlorine, lime or any chemical product.
instructions.warning2: Store bottles in a cool place away from sunlight.
instructions.warning3: Wear gloves during handling. Safe biological product.
instructions.warning4: Respect the application intervals for each product.

embio3000.subtitle: Biological treatment for waste lagoons
embio3000.purpose: 1 bottle per 700 m³ of waste, apply every 15 days. This process serves bovine and swine waste lagoons.
embio3000.step1: Dissolve in 10L of clean, non-chlorinated water.
embio3000.step2: Wait 24h for activation, keep the container covered with a cloth.
embio3000.step4: Pour the mixture near the running propulsor so it spreads throughout the lagoon.
embio3000.calcDesc: 1 bottle per 700 m³. Application every 15 days.
embio3000.calcResult: For {{value}} m³, you will need {{frascos}} bottle(s) per application.

embio3100.subtitle: Biological treatment for animal waste in stalls
embio3100.purpose: 1 bottle of 450g per 1,000 animals. Apply inside swine stalls, channels, grates or water sheets. Repeat every 15 days.
embio3100.step1: Dissolve in 10L of clean, non-chlorinated water.
embio3100.step2: Wait 24h for activation, keep the container covered with a cloth.
embio3100.step4: Apply inside swine stalls, channels, grates or water sheets.
embio3100.calcDesc: 1 bottle of 450g per 1,000 animals. Application every 15 days.
embio3100.calcResult: For {{value}} animals, you will need {{frascos}} bottle(s) per application.

embio5000.subtitle: Fly larvae and pathogen control
embio5000.purpose: Used for fly larvae control in equine, bovine, caprine and ovine facilities. Exclusive action for fly larvae and pathogen control.
embio5000.step1: 1 bottle for up to 60-70L of water.
embio5000.calcDesc: 1 bottle for up to 60 stalls. Weekly application.
embio5000.calcResult: For {{value}} stalls, you will need {{frascos}} bottle(s) per week. Each bottle produces 60L of mixture and treats up to 60 stalls.

embio6000.subtitle: Exclusive for properties with Biodigester
embio6000.purpose: Use only if the property has a Biodigester after the swine stalls. EMBIO 6000 delays waste degradation for up to 10 days, preserving the energy potential for the biodigester.
embio6000.step1: Dissolve 1 bottle of 450g in up to 130L of water.
embio6000.step2: Apply in swine stalls every 10 days.
embio6000.step3: No need to wait 24h to activate — can be applied immediately.
embio6000.attentionText: Send the waste to the Biodigester between 9 and 10 days after application, as this is the period the product delays degradation. If you don't send the waste to the Bio, there is a risk of gas production inside the stalls.
embio6000.calcDesc: 1 bottle per 1,000 animals. Application every 10 days.
embio6000.calcResult: For {{value}} animals (biodigester), you will need {{frascos}} bottle(s) per application.

embio8000.subtitle: Treatment for dairy lagoons with high fat content
embio8000.purpose: Designed for dairy lagoons with high fat content waste. 1 bottle per 700 m³, apply every 15 days.
embio8000.step1: Dissolve in 10L of clean, non-chlorinated water.
embio8000.step2: Wait 24h for activation, keep the container covered with a cloth.
embio8000.step4: Pour the mixture near the running propulsor so it spreads throughout the lagoon.
embio8000.calcDesc: 1 bottle per 700 m³. Application every 15 days.
embio8000.calcResult: For {{value}} m³, you will need {{frascos}} bottle(s) per application.

propulsors.warning3to5: ⚠️ Do not recommend 3HP, 4HP and 5HP propulsors for bovine manure. Only motors above 7.5HP.
propulsors.selectForSpecs: Select the waste type to see specifications

p3cv.title: 3HP Propulsor
p3cv.subtitle: Recommended for swine manure lagoons up to 400 m³

p4cv.title: 4HP Propulsor
p4cv.subtitle: Recommended for swine manure lagoons from 401 to 800 m³

p5cv.title: 5HP Propulsor
p5cv.subtitle: Recommended for swine manure lagoons from 401 to 800 m³
p5cv.info: The 5HP Propulsor has the same dimensions as the 4HP, but operates with more mechanical clearance, thus increasing the machine's lifespan.

p10cv.title: 10HP Propulsor
p10cv.warningSwine: ⚠️ Above 2,200 m³ you need to quote more than 1 machine for the same lagoon.
p10cv.warningBovine: ⚠️ Above 2,000 m³ you need to quote more than 1 machine for the same lagoon.

calculator.halfUsageNote: Use half on the 1st application and the rest on the next one
